scripts.quality: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm pack:check && pnpm plugin:check
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @eventforge/core exec vitest run --coverage --coverage.reporter=text --coverage.reporter=json-summary && pnpm --filter @eventforge/cloudflare exec vitest run --coverage --coverage.reporter=text --coverage.reporter=json-summary && pnpm --filter @eventforge/control-plane exec vitest run --coverage --coverage.reporter=text --coverage.reporter=json-summary && pnpm --filter @eventforge/console exec vitest run --coverage --coverage.reporter=text --coverage.reporter=json-summary && pnpm --filter @eventforge/desktop exec vitest run --coverage --coverage.reporter=text --coverage.reporter=json-summary && pnpm --filter @eventforge/mcp-server test:coverage
